articles.title: Trump Rages at Kimmel After Star Poked Fun at Marriage to Melania
articles.description: Evan Vucci / REUTERS Donald Trump has launched a bitter attack against Jimmy Kimmel amid the late-night host’s attacks against the president. In a Truth Social post, the 79-year-old president demanded that the Jimmy Kimmel Live! host be fired after he doubled down on his jokes about Trump’s marriage to the first lady, Melania Trump. “When is ABC Fake News Network firing seriously unfunny Jimmy Kimmel, who incompetently presides over one of the Lowest Rated shows on Television? People are angry. It better be soon!!!” Trump wrote. Read more at The Daily Beast.

articles.title: Zach Cregger's Resident Evil Trailer Mimics The Games In A Way The Previous Movies Never Did
Impatient Trump issues new demand to fire comedian he hates: 'Better be soon!'
articles.description: President Donald Trump signaled his impatience with ABC over his long-simmering feud with late-night talk show host Jimmy Kimmel. The 79-year-old president demanded the network remove Kimmel from the airwaves over a joke he made last week in which he described first lady Melania Trump as having "the glow of an expectant widow," and his Federal Communications Commission chairman Brendan Carr has directed Walt Disney Co. to file early license renewal applications for its local affiliate stations. "When is ABC Fake News Network firing seriously unfunny Jimmy Kimmel, who incompetently presides over one of the Lowest Rated shows on Television?" Trump posted Thursday morning on Truth Social. "People are angry. It better be soon!!! President DJT." Both the president and his wife have publicly called on ABC to fire Kimmel over his April 23 joke, which they have blamed for an alleged assassination attempt two days later at the White House Correspondents' Dinner. ABC briefly suspended Kimmel in September following backlash over his comments about the suspect accused of assassinating conservative activist Charlie Kirk in Utah.
